sentences.arabic: تُعْتَبَرُ آلَةُ العُودِ رَمْزًا لِلمُوسِيقَى العَرَبِيَّةِ الكَلَاسِيكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Instrument oud se smatra simbolom klasične arapske muzike.
sentences.translationEn: The oud instrument is considered a symbol of classical Arabic music.

sentences.arabic: صَوْتُ العُودِ عَمِيقٌ وَيَبْعَثُ الهُدُوءَ فِي النَّفْسِ.
sentences.translation: Zvuk ouda je dubok i unosi mir u dušu.
sentences.translationEn: The sound of the oud is deep and brings peace to the soul.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ العَدِيدُ مِنَ الفَنَّانِينَ العَزْفَ عَلَيْهِ مُنْذُ القِدَمِ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi umjetnici su od davnina učili svirati na njemu.
sentences.translationEn: Many artists have learned to play it since ancient times.

sentences.arabic: يُرَافِقُ العُودُ الأَغَانِي الشَّعْبِيَّةَ فِي المُنَاسَبَاتِ السَّعِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Oud prati narodne pjesme u sretnim prilikama.
sentences.translationEn: The oud accompanies folk songs on happy occasions.

sentences.arabic: يُحِبُّ النَّاسُ الِاسْتِمَاعَ إِلَى أَلْحَانِهِ فِي المَقَاهِي التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi vole slušati njegove melodije u tradicionalnim kafanama.
sentences.translationEn: People love listening to its melodies in traditional cafes.
